title: V3Lexer_pregen.yy.cpp compile errors on macOS Tahoe
body:
### Happening on a Mac Mini:
- macOS Tahoe 26.2
- clang++ --version # Apple clang version 17.0.0 (clang-1700.6.4.2)

### Errors:
```
In file included from ../V3ParseLex.cpp:30:
V3Lexer_pregen.yy.cpp:9632:18: error: out-of-line definition of 'LexerInput' does not match any declaration in 'V3LexerBase'
 9632 | int yyFlexLexer::LexerInput( char* buf, int /* max_size */ )
      |                  ^~~~~~~~~~
V3Lexer_pregen.yy.cpp:9661:19: error: out-of-line definition of 'LexerOutput' does not match any declaration in 'V3LexerBase'
 9661 | void yyFlexLexer::LexerOutput( const char* buf, int size )
```

### Fixes:
I have some fixes in script src/flexfix that allows the build, tests and examples to pass on Tahoe. Will make a fork and push for your feedback/review. I did not see this issue in the open list. Thanks.

In file included from ../V3ParseLex.cpp:30:
V3Lexer_pregen.yy.cpp:9632:18: error: out-of-line definition of 'LexerInput' does not match any declaration in 'V3LexerBase'
 9632 | int yyFlexLexer::LexerInput( char* buf, int /* max_size */ )
      |                  ^~~~~~~~~~
V3Lexer_pregen.yy.cpp:9661:19: error: out-of-line definition of 'LexerOutput' does not match any declaration in 'V3LexerBase'
 9661 | void yyFlexLexer::LexerOutput( const char* buf, int size )
